◎简　　介  

　　The 'Guess How Much I Love You animated series is set in a timeless watercolour landscape of grassy fields, mossy forests, lazy rivers and sunny green valleys. It's an innocent, picture-book world of butterflies, flowers, whimsy and wonder. This is the idyllic home of Little Nutbrown Hare and his father, Big Nutbrown Hare. The series follows their adventures as they explore the...
